name: bounceban-plugins
description: Plugins by BounceBan for email verification and deliverability workflows in Claude Code.

plugins.name: bounceban
plugins.description: Verify email addresses with the BounceBan API: single and bulk verification specializing in catch-all (accept-all) and SEG-protected emails, quick free/disposable/role/syntax checks, credits and rate-limit management, and webhooks.
